message:
test(escape-parser): add 19 unit tests for Hyperlink type

Cover all Hyperlink constructors (new, new_implicit, new_with_id,
new_with_params), equality/clone/debug/display, parse with various
inputs (clear link, simple, with params, error case), and
compute_shape_hash consistency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
